message:
refactor(sync): improve mutex fairness and semaphore efficiency

Enhance synchronization primitives:

mutex.rs:
- Improve fairness under high contention
- Add priority inheritance hints for OS scheduler
- Better integration with Cx cancellation tokens
- Add metrics for lock wait times

semaphore.rs:
- Improve permit acquisition efficiency
- Better handling of concurrent acquire/release
- Minor cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
